extraction.one_line_summary: DUMOULIN attacked final 800m of Oropa summit finish after controlling QUINTANA's moves, beating ZAKARIN by 3 seconds plus 10-second bonus.
tactical_patterns: ROSA sacrifice ride fractured Movistar domestiques early, isolating QUINTANA despite team initially setting tempo on climb approach.
ZAKARIN's attack 6.2km from summit forced DUMOULIN to reveal climbing strength prematurely, enabling QUINTANA to mark without working.
DUMOULIN bridged to ZAKARIN while dragging QUINTANA, then counter-attacked final 800m when Colombian stopped contributing to pace.
POZZOVIVO's isolation as GC threat eliminated despite early move, showing no alliance willingness from QUINTANA or DUMOULIN camps.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Won summit finish after controlling multiple attacks, extending GC lead to 2:47 over QUINTANA with climbing strength revelation.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lost 24 seconds total failing to respond to DUMOULIN's final 800m surge, relied entirely on marking without offensive contribution.
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: Stage-threatening attack 6.2km out forced GC response, held on for second place demonstrating sustained climbing power.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Dropped when DUMOULIN accelerated to bridge ZAKARIN's move, unable to follow GC group's elite pace.
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: negative: Distanced early when ROSA's tempo fractured peloton, suggesting vulnerability on sustained HC climbs.
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: neutral: Early attack showed willingness but tactically isolated without alliance support from GC contenders.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Followed initial ZAKARIN move but faded from contention before final 800m decisive acceleration.
rider_signals.ROSA Diego: positive: Sacrifice pacemaking destroyed Movistar's depth despite being dropped himself, textbook super-domestique performance.
